name: Shrimp and Asparagus Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 x Endive or Green leaf lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook green asparagus in boiling salted water until barely tender, about 1 minute.
If purple asparagus is tender, don't cook at all.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine cooked asparagus, shrimp, and chopped red bell pepper.
3. In another bowl, mix mayonnaise, finely chopped parsley, celery seed, salt, prepared horseradish, lemon juice; stir into shrimp mixture.
4. Spoon the salad onto endive or lettuce leaves.
5. Sprinkle with diced hard-cooked eggs and garnish with lemon wedges.
